allow: PowerShell(taskkill /PID 12996 /F 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "3000 still in use by $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 3000 free" }; $c2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c2\) { "3001 in use by $\($c2.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 3001 free" })
